title: Notification No.16/2002-Cus(NT), dated 07.03.2002
text: 7th March, 2002 Notification No.16/2002-Customs (N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962) and in supersession of notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) No.29/97-Customs (N.T.), dated the 7th July, 1997, the Central Government appoints the officers mentioned in column (2) of the Table below to be Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), and such officers shall have the jurisdiction in relation to an order or decision of the officer subordinate to the officer as mentioned in the column (3) of the said Table with effect from the date to be notified by the Central Government in the Official Gazette. Table Sl.No Designation of Officer Jurisdiction (1) (2) (3) 1 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Delhi-I Commissioners of Customs, Aircargo (Import) and General Delhi, Aircargo (Export) Delhi, (Preventive) Amritsar. 2 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Delhi-II Commissioners of Customs, (ICDs) Delhi, (Preventive) Delhi. 3 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Mumbai-I Commissioners of Customs, Mulund CFS and (General) Mumbai, (Export) Mumbai, (Import) Mumbai. 4 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Mumbai-II Commissioners of Customs, (Export) Nhava Sheva, (Import) Nhava Sheva. 5 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Mumbai-III Commissioners of Customs, (Airport) Mumbai, Aircargo (Export) Mumbai, Aircargo (Import) Mumbai, (Preventive) Mumbai. 6 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Kolkata Commissioners of Customs, (Port) Kolkata, (Airport) Kolkata, (Preventive) West-Bengal. 7 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Chennai Commissioners of Customs, Port (Import) Chennai, Port (Export) Chennai, Airport and Aircargo Chennai, (Preventive) Chennai. 8 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Bangalore Commissioners of Customs, Bangalore, Mangalore. 9 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Ahmedabad-I & Ahmedabad-II Commissioners of Customs, Ahmedabad, (Preventive) Jamnagar. 10 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Kandla Commissioner of Customs, Kandla. 11 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Thiruvananthapuram Commissioners of Customs, Cochin, (Preventive) Cochin. -- 1 of 2 -- 12 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Vishakhapatnam Commissioner of Customs, Vishakhapatnam. 13 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Pune Commissioners of Customs, Pune, Commissioner of Customs and Central Excise, Goa. 14 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Jalandhar Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive) Amritsar. 15 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Jaipur Commissioners of Customs, Jodhpur. 16 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Patna Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive) Patna. 17 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Lucknow Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive) Lucknow. 18 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals), Tiruchirapalli. Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive) Tiruchirapalli. 19 Commissioner of Customs (Appeals),Guwahati Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive) Shillong. D.S.
